title: Senior Test Manager
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Lead the design, planning, and execution of end-to-end test strategies for complex Core Banking transformation programs (including deposits, loans, payments, GL, and customer master).
  • Build, mentor, and manage high-performing QA teams (onshore/offshore) to ensure consistent delivery of quality, efficiency, and compliance.
  • Conduct workload estimation, risk assessment, and mitigation planning for large-scale testing engagements.
  • Drive test innovation: Research, introduce, and scale modern testing methodologies (e.g., shift-left, automation-first, data-driven testing) across banking projects.
  • Develop and maintain a Core Banking knowledge repository, including business process maps, test assets, and training materials.
  • Actively participate in pre-sales activities: Lead client workshops, respond to RFPs/RFIs, deliver solution presentations, and support proposal development for Core Banking testing services.
  • Collaborate closely with architects, business analysts, and delivery leads to influence technical implementation approaches and ensure testability from design phase.

Qualifications & Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Finance, or related field (must be from a recognized university).
  • 8+ years of experience in the banking industry, with deep understanding of Core Banking business processes and system architecture (deposits, lending, payments, GL, CIF).
  • Proven track record in at least 3 full-lifecycle Core Banking implementation/replacement projects (either as a testing consultant or delivery lead).
  • Strong ability to define test master plans, make technical trade-offs, and provide strategic recommendations on application architecture and testing solutions.
  • Experience managing testing teams on foreign-funded bank projects (e.g., UBS, HSBC, Standard Chartered, Citibank, DBS, OCBC) is highly preferred.
  • Excellent command of English: Fluent in reading, writing, and spoken communication (must be comfortable presenting to C-level stakeholders).
  • Outstanding interpersonal, negotiation, and problem-solving skills; able to thrive under pressure and manage tight deadlines.
  • Willingness to travel within APAC and work flexible hours to align with global teams.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with Mainframe-to-modern-platform migration (e.g., COBOL → Java/Cloud) and associated data validation challenges.
  • Hands-on knowledge of test automation frameworks (API/UI/DB layer) and CI/CD integration in banking environments.
  • Familiarity with Singapore MAS guidelines or global banking regulations (e.g., BCBS 239, SOX).

postedCompany.description:
Beyondsoft is a global Products, IT Consulting, Solutions and Service provider.  Founded in 1995 and headquartered in Beijing, China, Beyondsoft has over 70 nationwide offices, R&D bases and delivery centres, as well as facilities in United States, Japan, India, Singapore, Spain and Malaysia. 

Relying on its strong R&D heritage and ability to innovate, Beyondsoft focuses on using emerging, disruptive technologies, such as mobility, big data, cloud and analytics, to provide powerful solutions and products for clients in a wide range of industries including high-tech, eCommerce, finance, automobile, retail, logistics, energy, manufacturing, healthcare, telecommunications, media and entertainment, as well as travel. 

Beyondsoft has worked with some of the tech industry’s biggest players, including Microsoft, AWS, Vertica, and Adobe. Beyondsoft was Microsoft’s first vendor in China. Since its inception, Beyondsoft has established a strong working relationship with Microsoft, which has grown to become a global strategic partnership spanning decades. Today, Beyondsoft is a Microsoft Gold partner with expertise in Azure, Data Analytics, and Application Development. The company is also one of the partners in the Mixed Reality Partner Program. Over the years, its customers have trusted Beyondsoft to deliver Microsoft solutions founded upon Azure, PowerBI, Machine Learning, Mixed Reality, and other technologies.
postedCompany.name: BEYONDSOFT TECHNOLOGY (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
